Off Calendar Aug-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Dale Bellitto, Esq., LONG & LEVIT LLP, 415-397-2222, for Defendants Horner Law Group et al (via ZOOM Appearance)
No other appearances

Discussed. Not ARGUED.

DEFENDANT CLIFFORD HORNER, BRENDAN DOOLEY, HORNER LAW GROUP, P.C.'s MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES.

Defendants' motion for award of appellate attorney fees and costs is granted in part.
Defendants won an anti-SLAPP motion and were awarded fees and costs. (7/29/21 Order; CCP 425.16(c)(1).) Plaintiffs appealed and lost again. Defendants' motion for appellate fees and costs is adjudged as follows.

First, as to hourly rates, the 7/29/21 Order's findings are adopted; in sum: "The hourly rates that defendants were charged were $330 for partners, $265 for associates and $170 for legal assistants, which the Court finds to be reasonable." (Id. at 3:9-10.)
Second, defense counsels' hours worked on the appeal are also reasonable. Plaintiffs complain that an associate worked more hours than partners, but that is to be expected of a properly leveraged law firm.

Third, as to costs, an appellate-specialist attorney is not a CCP 1033.5(b)(1) "expert," so her/his compensation is a fee, not a cost. Defendants are due $595 in costs.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
